options.command: sh -c 'rm -rf /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-yaml /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-playground; mkdir -p /tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-playground; export PORT="${PORT:-3334}" FIBE_SETTINGS_YAML_PATHS=../e2e-api/fixtures/fibe-settings.e2e.yml PLAYGROUNDS_DIR=/tmp/fibe-agent-e2e-playground MOCK_ECHO_PROMPT=true NODE_ENV=production; (cd ../api && node dist/main.js) & sleep 3 && bun test --preload ./src/support/test-setup.ts'
